name: Garlic Potatoes with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Thin-skinned red and/or white potatoes (about 18)
3 T Minced, drained oil-packed dried tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes.
2. Preheat oven to 500°F. Heat olive oil in a 10" by 15" roasting pan until hot, about 1 1/2 minutes.
3. Add potatoes and onion; shake the pan to coat vegetables with oil.
4. Place chicken upright on a vertical roaster at one end of the pan, or place chicken on a V-shaped roasting rack surrounded by potatoes and onion.
5. Cook for 15 minutes, then add garlic and cook for an additional 30 minutes, stirring vegetables every 10 minutes.
6. Remove chicken to a platter. Stir tomatoes and rosemary leaves into potato mixture; arrange alongside chicken.
7. Garnish with fresh rosemary sprigs (if using) and season with salt and pepper to taste.
